case_title: KLOCKSIEM, STEVEN J. vs. ROBERTS, MATTHEW JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE:HERBERT DONALDSON/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:MITCH LYON 10:00AM: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLFF STEVEN J. KLOCKSIEM PRESENT WITH HIS COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJI. DEFT MATTHEW JOHN ROBERTS PRESENT & APPEARING PRO PER. OTHER DEFT, DARRYL SALAZAR, NOT PRESENT(ALSO ANSWERED THE COMPLAINT). ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLFF. ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY DEFT. JUDGMENT FOR PLFF AND AGST BOTH DEFTS MATTHEW JOHN ROBERTS AND DARRYL SALAZAR.
